message:
test(fuzz): validate_frame_lengths DoS gate (dtdnf)

Add fuzz_validate_frame_lengths covering fcp_protocol::validate_frame_lengths
(fcps.rs:536) — the DoS-resistance gate that rejects malformed FCPS
frames before any allocation. Currently invoked transitively by
FcpsFrame::decode but not fuzzed as a discrete unit. Properties: a
strategy switch drives the fuzzer through (1) self-consistent
header+bytes → Ok, (2) wrong total_payload_len → LengthMismatch with
both fields preserved verbatim, (3) bytes shorter than expected →
FrameSizeMismatch, (4) bytes longer than expected → FrameSizeMismatch.
Once-gated anchors verify the empty-payload happy path, the wrong-
total_payload_len branch where LengthMismatch fires before the size
check, both short/long bytes, and the (u32::MAX, u16::MAX) extreme
that must not panic and returns either SymbolCountOverflow or
LengthMismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
